reviews.review_title: No longer working on Oculus Go in 2022
reviews.review_description: This along with other VR apps on the Go no longer work.  Amaze won’t even load and Gala360, Skybox VR are others with no content. Shame on Meta et Al. No reason for me to buy the Quest 2 since these formerly great VR apps don’t appear or work on them either.
I just got the Oculus Go, and so far Its great.This app, is my favourite. “Would be nice to see handsome men on here too” for the women 🙂
How do you search within the app. I don't see tab?

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. For your question, there is no search bar/tab with the current version of the Amaze app. Instead, All videos are located under the Discovery section. Please navigate to the Discovery section from the Home screen, and you’ll find a collection of Channels. (Each channel contains several videos related to the channel)

We hope to provide a more user-friendly search function in the future. Could you please help us by letting us know what specific content or keyword you wanted to search via email? Please email us at connect@amazevr.com It will give us a great insight into our future search function implementation.

We look forward to hearing back from you.

Thank you,
Amaze

reviews.review_description: An app with great potential and I would have given it 5 stars but the biggest problem I got with it is that the people in the video are too small. This is better than them being giants which is a problem with other apps I’ve found. But them being midgets isn’t that much better either. If the people in the video looked normal size it would make it seem more real and this app would really be great.

developer_response.body:
Hello jksyle7,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with AmazeVR.

We understand that while our 3D video playback provides the best high-quality VR experience, it could be eye-straining after long usage.

To address this problem and to improve user experience, we have updated our app to allow users to choose between 2D and 3D playback options.

Please navigate to the play menu of any video, click on the settings icon from the play menu and adjust to the preferred viewing option.

Please give it a try. Thank you for helping us improve with your feedback, and we look forward to hearing your feedback as we move forward.

Sincerely,
Amaze

reviews.review_description: Please make more hot videos with the thumbnail girl.

Why are all the women big-boned, and sloppy?  Guess you couldn't find any in-shape/athletic and skilled women? 

If you like thick girls, this is your app, otherwise not much to see here except my lunch I just puked up in VR

Btw pole dancing isn't a sport, please don't try to make that claim devs. Little boys might think that way.
i can spend all my time on this app. It’s something in it for everyone. Keep the shows/movies  coming .

Tried it & was impressed at how well done the videos are, very clear. My only negative is that there is no way to bookmark favourites, or search for them, if you wish to watch over again or show to friends.

reviews.review_title: Nice film but only with wifi not to go
reviews.review_description: It's a nice app but you need fast wifi. So I loaded most films to see them. Buts it's not possible to see my loaded films without internet. Why?? It works by: within, Samsung... PLEASE give me a possibility to watch my films during I am without wifi. It's called oculus  GO!! :-)

developer_response.body:
Hello nicole.blumel.71,

Thank you for writing to Amaze VR. Currently, all users require an internet connection to start/load the Amaze app on every device (It is a process distinct from the video download option). We appreciate your feedback, and we will take the efforts to provide the offline mode in the future.

Thanks,
Amaze

reviews.review_description: This app has the best content I was able to find so far!  Please keep doing it!  Extremely entertaining! Thank you for all your hard work and to those who make the videos!

reviews.review_title: I Hope They Add Amaze To The Quest 2
reviews.review_description: I loved every bit of Amaze on the GO, now I've migrated onto the Quest 2. Id love to see Amaze Added to the quest 2.
This was the most impressive part for Gear VR experience so far. Really cool!
The game was good, but is there a way I can use my google play or apple card to pay for the rest?
Would be a great app but everything cost money. And not enough content.

developer_response.body:
Hello, docginn

Thank you for writing to AmazeVR. We have over 200+ free and a number of paid VR content in our app, and we want to help you find more free content in our app. Once you see the initial Home screen, please navigate around the menu to find more free content in the Discover section.

Virtual reality is a new medium, and we are constantly pushing to improve our user experience. Thank you for helping us grow with your feedback, and we hope you continue to do so as we move forward.


Thank you,
Amaze

reviews.review_description: Amaze offers interesting interactive video stories (multiple choice selections) with clear high res video without shaking, good acting, good locations. Some parts POV (I like those best) some not. A very good start so far. Looking forward to see more.
Best VR app for turkey dinner
